title: grounded.tools Version
description: A specific indexed version of a library's documentation, including metadata about the indexing process and document counts.

version.description: Version string. Supports full semver (1.2.3), pre-release (1.2.3-beta.1), or partial (1, 1.2).

documentCount.description: Number of indexed documents for this version.

uniqueUrlCount.description: Number of unique URLs indexed for this version.

indexedAt.description: Timestamp when the version was indexed.

status.description: Current status of the version in the store.

sourceUrl.description: Original source URL used for scraping this version's documentation.
